description: Versioned seed eval set for the trading brief / Conviction Score workflow.

cases.name: Textbook VCP breakout should clear GO

input.priceAction: Tight volatility contraction base near highs; breakout above pivot on strong volume.

cases.name: Low-volume 21EMA pullback should be WATCH, not auto-failed for low RVOL

input.priceAction: Orderly pullback into rising 21EMA after a prior breakout; volume contracts below average.
input.entry: Needs reversal trigger or tight area break

cases.name: Parabolic extension should fail the entry gate

input.priceAction: Three-day vertical move, far above the 21EMA and 50MA, no tight base.
input.stop: Would require wide stop below parabolic low

cases.name: Great catalyst without trigger should not become GO

input.priceAction: Strong news response but price is mid-range with no base, no pivot, and no clean risk point.

cases.name: Intraday ORB/U&R signal inside a wide-loose range must PASS

input.priceAction: Wide loose range with repeated 5-11% daily swings and a high-volume distribution day; undercut of the range low bounces back mid-range on below-average volume; bullish 15-minute opening range breakout on the bounce day.
input.stop: Sub-ATR stop inside the range noise

cases.name: Fresh EP with understated intraday (cumulative) RVOL must not be auto-failed for low volume

input.priceAction: Gaps +15% on a fresh multi-year datacenter-lease catalyst with heavy volume near the open. TradingView's intraday relative_volume_10d_calc reads only 1.1x because it is cumulative-so-far-today against a full-day average; OpenD's time-adjusted volume_ratio reads ~3.9x for the same tape.
input.rs: fresh gap off a neglected base
input.entry: The gap is the trigger; a safe entry needs an intraday pullback or opening-range reclaim
